title: Fix PS-69966: The Pay App is not pulling the revenue amount from a PCCO into the SOV line item
body: Non-consolidated implementation is incorrect and needs to be updated to use RevenueAmount instead of BdgtAppliedAmount
author: Anthony-Angulo-Code

reviews.body:
## Pull request overview

Updates the Application for Pay (AFP) PCCO-to-SOV item sourcing so that non-consolidated PCCOs use the PotentialCO revenue amount (as intended) rather than the budget applied amount.

**Changes:**
- Updated `s_enc_Find_PCCOs_For_AFPs` (non-consolidated path) to use `PotentialCO.RevenueAmount` for `ScheduledValue` and `UnitPrice` instead of `BdgtAppliedAmount`.
- Regenerated the deployment delta script to apply the stored procedure change during upgrades.
- Updated the stored-proc hash/version record to reflect the new `base_procs.sql` contents.

### Reviewed changes

Copilot reviewed 3 out of 3 changed files in this pull request and generated no comments.

| File | Description |
| ---- | ----------- |
| Core/SQL/base_procs.sql | Switches non-consolidated AFP PCCO item amounts to `RevenueAmount` (fix for PS-69966). |
| Core/SQL/delta_procs.sql | Applies the same stored procedure change in the generated delta deployment script. |
| Core/SQL/record_procs_hash.sql | Updates the procs MD5/version marker to match the modified procedure set. |
reviews.author: copilot-pull-request-reviewer[bot]

+         p.RevenueAmount AS ScheduledValue ,
+         p.RevenueAmount AS UnitPrice ,
          1 AS ScheduledQty ,
          p.PCOID
            /* No need to use list_PrimeContractCO here since we aren't applying security or extracting other information */

@@ -38,6 +12,29 @@ SET ANSI_NULLS, ANSI_PADDING, ANSI_WARNINGS, ARITHABORT, CONCAT_NULL_YIELDS_NULL
 SET NUMERIC_ROUNDABORT OFF;
 GO
 
+ALTER PROCEDURE dbo.s_enc_Find_PCCOs_For_AFPs
+  @NewChangeOrderIDs      PKTableType READONLY,
+  @ExistingPCOIDs         PKTableType READONLY
+AS
+
+  SELECT p.Description,
+         pcco.PCCONumber ,
+         pcco.ChangeOrderID ,
+         p.PCONumber ,
+         p.RevenueAmount AS ScheduledValue ,
+         p.RevenueAmount AS UnitPrice ,
+         1 AS ScheduledQty ,
+         p.PCOID
+           /* No need to use list_PrimeContractCO here since we aren't applying security or extracting other information */
+    FROM PrimeContractCO pcco INNER JOIN @NewChangeOrderIDs ids ON pcco.ChangeOrderID = ids.Value
+           /* No need to use list_potentialco here */
+         INNER JOIN PotentialCO p ON pcco.ChangeOrderID = p.ChangeOrderID
+   WHERE p.Deleted = 0
+     AND pcco.Deleted = 0
+     AND p.PCOID NOT IN (SELECT Value FROM @ExistingPCOIDs)
+     /* Do NOT check HasAccess - All records are included regardless of sharing rules */
+ORDER BY p.PCONumber
+GO
 ALTER PROCEDURE dbo.s_enc_get_SiteCaptures_for_annotation
   @AnnotationId        int
 AS
